# Growth over time

## Level 2 Charging Stations Over Time
```{r}
dg = d %>%
  filter(status=='avail', open.date>='2010-01-01', lev2>0) %>%
  group_by(open.date, network2) %>%
  summarise(lev2=sum(lev2, na.rm=T)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  complete(open.date, network2, fill=list(lev2=0)) %>%
  arrange(open.date) %>%
  group_by(network2) %>%
  mutate(cumul.lev2 = cumsum(lev2)) 
tail(dg,10)

dmax = dg %>%
  filter(cumul.lev2==max(cumul.lev2), 
         open.date==max(open.date)) 
dmax
```

```{r fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
library(grid)
title = "Level 2 Charging Stations Over Time" 
g = ggplot(dg, aes(x=open.date, y=cumul.lev2, color=network2, label=network2))+
  geom_text(data=dmax, hjust=0, show.legend = F, nudge_x = 100)+
  geom_line(show.legend=F)+
  geom_point(data=dmax, show.legend = F)+
  labs(title    = title,
       caption  = 'As of Jan 15, 2023. Data: https://afdc.energy.gov/',
       x = 'Open Date', 
       y = 'Cumulative Number of Level 2 Charging Stations')+  
  scale_x_date(
    # limits = as.Date(c('2010-01-01', 
    #                    '2023-01-15')),
               breaks = seq.Date(from= as.Date('2010-01-01'), 
                                 to  = as.Date('2023-01-01'), by='year'), 
               date_labels = '%Y') +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=comma, limits=c(0,54000), breaks=c(0, 27000, 54000))+ 
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c('orange', pubdarkgray, pubred,  ## let's use approximate
               'forestgreen', pubblue, pubmediumgray))+     ## company colors
  coord_cartesian(clip='off', expand=FALSE)+
  theme_pub(type='line', base_size=36/3) + 
  theme(legend.title=element_blank(), 
        plot.margin = margin(t =  70*1/72*12/36,
                             r = 300*1/72*12/36,
                             b =  50*1/72*12/36,
                             l =  50*1/72*12/36, unit='in'))
g
```



## Level 3 Charging Stations Over Time

```{r}
dg = d %>%
  filter(status=='avail', open.date>='2010-01-01', lev3>0) %>%
  group_by(open.date, network3) %>%
  summarise(lev3=sum(lev3, na.rm=T)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  complete(open.date, network3, fill=list(lev3=0)) %>%
  arrange(open.date) %>%
  group_by(network3) %>%
  mutate(cumul.lev3 = cumsum(lev3))
tail(dg,10)

dmax = dg %>%
  filter(cumul.lev3==max(cumul.lev3), 
         open.date==max(open.date)) 
dmax
```


```{r fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
title = "Level 3 Charging Stations Over Time" 
g = ggplot(dg, aes(x=open.date, y=cumul.lev3, color=network3, label=network3))+
  geom_text(data=dmax, hjust=0, show.legend = F, nudge_x = 100)+
  geom_line(show.legend=F)+
  geom_point(data=dmax, show.legend = F)+
  labs(title    = title,
       caption  = 'As of Jan 15, 2023. Data: https://afdc.energy.gov/',
       x = 'Open Date', 
       y = 'Cumulative Number of Level 3 Charging Stations')+  
  scale_x_date(
    # limits = as.Date(c('2010-01-01', 
    #                    '2023-01-15')),
               breaks = seq.Date(from= as.Date('2010-01-01'), 
                                 to  = as.Date('2023-01-01'), by='year'), 
               date_labels = '%Y') +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=comma, limits=c(0,20000), breaks=c(0, 10000, 20000))+ 
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(pubred  , 'darkturquoise', 'navy',          ## let's use approx
               'darkorange', pubdarkgray, pubmediumgray))+ ## company colors
  coord_cartesian(clip='off', expand=FALSE)+
  theme_pub(type='line', base_size=36/3) + 
  theme(legend.title=element_blank(), 
        plot.margin = margin(t =  70*1/72*12/36,
                             r = 300*1/72*12/36,
                             b =  50*1/72*12/36,
                             l =  50*1/72*12/36, unit='in'))
g
```
